---
title: "Plot Follicle"
params:
  sample: "default"
  path: "."
format:
  pptx: default
execute:
  echo: false
  output: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
import spatialdata
import spatialdata_plot
from spatialdata import transform
from spatialdata.models import ShapesModel
from spatialdata.transformations import get_transformation, set_transformation
# import session_info  # not in current container
from timer import timer, timing_summary

with timer("Setup"):
    with open("params.json") as f:
        params = json.load(f)

    sample = params["sample"]
    cell_id = Path(params["path"]).stem
    # 'path' is the staged follicle-level zarr produced by subset_follicle.
    zarr_path = params["path"]
```

```{python}
with timer("Read zarr"):
    sdata = spatialdata.read_zarr(zarr_path)
sdata
```

```{python}
with timer("Locate target cell"):
    target_cell = None
    target_circle_key = None
    if "cell_boundaries" in sdata.shapes:
        boundaries = sdata["cell_boundaries"]
        if cell_id in boundaries.index:
            target_circle_key = "target_cell_boundary"
            target_boundary = ShapesModel.parse(boundaries.loc[[cell_id]].copy())
            set_transformation(
                target_boundary,
                get_transformation(boundaries, get_all=True).copy(),
                set_all=True,
            )
            sdata[target_circle_key] = target_boundary
            target_cell = transform(sdata[target_circle_key], to_coordinate_system="global").iloc[0].geometry.centroid
    if target_circle_key is None and "cell_circles" in sdata.shapes:
        circles = sdata["cell_circles"]
        if cell_id in circles.index:
            target_circle_key = "target_cell_circle"
            target_circle = ShapesModel.parse(circles.loc[[cell_id]].copy())
            set_transformation(
                target_circle,
                get_transformation(circles, get_all=True).copy(),
                set_all=True,
            )
            sdata[target_circle_key] = target_circle
            target_cell = transform(sdata[target_circle_key], to_coordinate_system="global").iloc[0].geometry

if target_cell is None:
    print(f"Target cell '{cell_id}' not found in cell_boundaries or cell_circles; plots will be rendered without a highlight.")
else:
    print(f"Target cell '{cell_id}' centroid: ({target_cell.x:.1f}, {target_cell.y:.1f})")
```

```{python}
with timer("List images"):
    image_keys = list(sdata.images.keys())
print(f"Images: {image_keys}")
```

```{python}
import numpy as np
from matplotlib.colors import Normalize
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

figure_specs = []
figure_dir = Path("plot_follicle_figures")
figure_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

for img_key in image_keys:
    img = sdata.images[img_key]
    arr = next(iter(img.children.values())).image if hasattr(img, "children") else img
    for ch in arr.coords["c"].values:
        channel_name = str(ch)
        safe_channel = channel_name.replace("/", "_").replace(" ", "_")
        figure_path = figure_dir / f"{img_key}_{safe_channel}.png"

        with timer(f"Plot {img_key}[{channel_name}]"):
            vmin, vmax = np.percentile(np.asarray(arr.sel(c=ch)), [1, 99.5])
            plot = sdata.pl.render_images(
                element=img_key,
                channel=ch,
                cmap="gray",
                norm=Normalize(vmin=vmin, vmax=vmax),
            )
            if target_circle_key is not None:
                plot = plot.pl.render_shapes(
                    element=target_circle_key,
                    color="red",
                    fill_alpha=0.0,
                    outline_color="red",
                    outline_width=2.0,
                )

            ax = plot.pl.show(
                title=f"{sample} — {img_key} — {channel_name}",
                figsize=(6, 6),
                coordinate_systems="global",
                return_ax=True,
            )
            ax.figure.savefig(figure_path, dpi=200, bbox_inches="tight")
            plt.close(ax.figure)

        figure_specs.append(
            {
                "image_key": img_key,
                "channel": channel_name,
                "path": str(figure_path),
            }
        )
```

```{python}
#| output: asis

for spec in figure_specs:
    print(f"## {spec['image_key']} - {spec['channel']}\n")
    print(
        f"The grayscale panel shows the `{spec['channel']}` channel from `{spec['image_key']}` "
        "for this follicle subset. The red outline marks the cell boundary used to define "
        "the subset window.\n"
    )
    print(f"![]({spec['path']})\n")
```

```{python}
timing_summary()
```
